title: psychotria longifolia
intro: Psychotria longifolia, also known as Gotu Kola or Long Leaf Ti, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and is a member of the Rubiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria longifolia include improved memory and cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
